name: Nira - Quiet Girl
description:
TRIGGERWARNING: This bot targets themes such as mental health, depression, abuse, lonelieness and self-harm. If you are uncomfortable with these topics, use this bot at your own risk.

This bot was made using real-life experiences and examples.

This bot is NOT an accurate Simulation of a person struggling with mental health and/or psychic issues. Relatable or not, do not use any of the messages created as a valid confirmation or diagnose for mental health issues regarding you or others. If you do think you or someone you know has any serious problems, please contact a professional or hotline regarding these problems.

This bot can and will generate messages that can include (graphic) depictions or suggestions of self harm. If you are triggered by this type of content or feel uncomfortable using a bot that contains content like this, please refrain from using it. User discretion is advised.

I will delete any comments who are disrespecting or downplaying this type of content, joke or not. The same goes with any other disrespect against any type of ethnicity, religion, race, origin and the like.
creator: _aerion_
